title.en: 'We have another level we can reach' - Kane defends frustrated Tuchel
title.zh-CN: “我们有另一个可以达到的水平” -凯恩为沮丧的图切尔辩护

summary.en: Captain Harry Kane says England "have another level we can reach" as they bid to win the World Cup for the first time since 1966.
summary.zh-CN: 哈里·凯恩上尉说，英格兰“有另一个我们可以达到的水平” ，因为他们自1966年以来首次赢得世界杯冠军。

title.en: Tuchel unhappy with England display - so why do they keep winning?
title.zh-CN: Tuchel对英格兰的展示不满意-那么为什么他们继续获胜呢？

summary.en: Football tactics correspondent Umir Irfan examines why England are still winning games despite Thomas Tuchel insisting performances are not good.
summary.zh-CN: 足球战术记者乌米尔·伊尔凡（ Umir Irfan ）研究了为什么英格兰仍然赢得比赛，尽管托马斯·图切尔（ Thomas Tuchel ）坚持认为表现不佳。

title.en: 'We should all be excited' - Messi set for first England meeting
title.zh-CN: “我们都应该感到兴奋” -梅西将参加首次英格兰会议

summary.en: Lionel Messi is set for his first match against England after Argentina beat Switzerland in the World Cup quarter-finals.
summary.zh-CN: 莱昂内尔·梅西（ Lionel Messi ）将在世界杯四分之一决赛中击败瑞士队后首次对阵英格兰队。

title.en: Rice in bed for nearly three days before Norway game - Tuchel
title.zh-CN: 在挪威比赛前在床上躺了将近三天- Tuchel

summary.en: England boss Thomas Tuchel says Declan Rice was in bed for most of the three days prior to the World Cup quarter-final win against Norway because of a sickness bug.
summary.zh-CN: 英格兰主教练托马斯·图切尔（ Thomas Tuchel ）表示，由于疾病，德克兰·赖斯（ Declan Rice ）在世界杯四分之一决赛对阵挪威之前的三天中大部分时间都在床上。

title.en: Pick your England XI for World Cup semi-final
title.zh-CN: 为世界杯半决赛挑选您的英格兰XI

summary.en: England are through to the World Cup semi-finals, but who would you pick in your starting XI?
summary.zh-CN: 英格兰队已进入世界杯半决赛，但您会在首发阵容中选择谁？

title.en: Tuchel angry at 'lucky' England - but Bellingham defends players
title.zh-CN: 图切尔对“幸运”英格兰感到愤怒-但贝灵汉姆为球员辩护

summary.en: England head coach Thomas Tuchel is praised by former England players for saying his players "got lucky" in World Cup quarter-final win over Norway - but match-winner Jude Bellingham disagrees.
summary.zh-CN: 英格兰主教练托马斯·图切尔（ Thomas Tuchel ）因在世界杯四分之一决赛中击败挪威而受到前英格兰球员的赞扬，但获胜者裘德·贝林厄姆（ Jude Bellingham ）不同意。

title.en: Who am I? Guess World Cup star No 35
title.zh-CN: 我是谁？猜猜世界杯明星35号

summary.en: Will you get today's player in as few attempts as possible?
summary.zh-CN: 你会在尽可能少的尝试中获得今天的玩家吗？

title.en: Lamine Yamal? Mbappe? Kane? Pick your World Cup semi-final XI
title.zh-CN: Lamine Yamal ？ Mbappe ？ Kane ？选择您的世界杯半决赛十一

summary.en: As we look ahead to the World Cup semi-final, BBC Sport pick their last-four combined XI. Do you agree?
summary.zh-CN: 当我们展望世界杯半决赛时， BBC Sport选择了他们的最后四个组合XI。你同意吗？

title.en: Senegal sack manager Thiaw in wake of World Cup exit
title.zh-CN: 世界杯退出后，塞内加尔解雇了Thiaw经理

summary.en: Senegal sack manager Pape Thiaw in the aftermath of the country's exit at the last-32 stage of the 2026 World Cup.
summary.zh-CN: 在塞内加尔在2026年世界杯最后32阶段退出后，塞内加尔解雇了经理Pape Thiaw。

title.en: What England must do to win the World Cup from here
title.zh-CN: 英格兰必须做些什么才能从这里赢得世界杯

summary.en: BBC Sport takes a look at what England will need to do to reach the World Cup final after progressing to the semi-finals.
summary.zh-CN: 英国广播公司体育台了解英格兰队在进入半决赛后需要做些什么才能进入世界杯决赛。

summary.en: Argentina great Antonio Rattin, whose sending-off at the 1966 World Cup led to the introduction of red and yellow cards, dies aged 89.

summary.en: Jurgen Klopp agrees a deal in principle to become the new head coach of Germany's men's national team after the resignation of Julian Nagelsmann.
